description_long: This is a large, industrial-style blue dumpster with a robust, angular design and a domed lid. The lid features two main sections with visible seams and integrated handles, likely made of heavy-duty plastic or metal, and is equipped with a locking or opening mechanism. The body of the dumpster is rectangular with reinforced edges and sits on four sturdy wheels for mobility. There are prominent handles on the sides and front, designed for easy maneuvering and lid operation. The surface shows signs of wear and some minor scuff marks, indicating frequent use in urban environments. A faded label is visible on the rear, suggesting prior municipal or commercial use.
description: A large blue industrial dumpster with a domed lid, side and front handles, and four wheels for mobility. The surface is worn and features a faded label on the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angled domed lid, a prominent handle, and a visible wheel assembly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat side panel, two inset lid handles, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with similar lid and handle features, plus a visible locking mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a faded label, flat lid surface, and all four wheels clearly visible.
attribute_lid_type: domed, hinged lid with two main sections, made of plastic, with integrated handles and visible opening mechanism
attribute_handle_design: Three bar handles: one on each side and one on the front, all made of metal or reinforced plastic, rectangular in shape
